chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1998 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.10010/2016 3. For hearing of main case 11-01-2024 Mr. Karim Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner, no intimation received. Last time petition was fixed on 13.08.2020, since then no one has taken any interest in the petition. Accordingly this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
